codeReview.summary: The change replaces the two runtime-only browser import suppressions in the Playwright debug spec with documented `@ts-expect-error` comments, which satisfies the feature requirement without changing test behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker had to use `git add -f` because `.gitignore` ignores the entire `e2e` directory, even though this repository now tracks E2E specs there.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification for `fix-lint-e2e-ts-ignore` records `git add -f -- e2e/debug-show-dbnum-7997.spec.ts`; commit `42dd641121fa4fe71b7d3b3632a28663d7c35f66` adds `e2e/debug-show-dbnum-7997.spec.ts`.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the worker transcript, handoff, and commit `42dd641121fa4fe71b7d3b3632a28663d7c35f66`; the feature correctly swaps `@ts-ignore` for justified `@ts-expect-error` comments in `e2e/debug-show-dbnum-7997.spec.ts` with no functional regression found.
